summary: Iteration 20 - Marketing Dashboard Enhanced Features Testing. All features verified: campaign cards with dates/channels/CPL, detail modal with 3 tabs (Visao Geral, Conteudo, Resultados), KPI grid, CPL por Canal with progress bars, Fluxo de Mensagens timeline, Performance por Canal breakdown, and filters.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor Recharts sizing issue (existing issue from previous iterations)

seed_data_creation: Used existing 5 test campaigns from previous seed. Campaign IDs verified: c61e568c (Boas-vindas), 3ff5d83d (Reativacao), 2825c333 (Lancamento)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing page /marketing fully tested. All new features working: (1) Campaign cards show start/end dates, (2) Channel badges with correct colors (WhatsApp green #25D366, Instagram pink #E4405F, Facebook blue, Email gold #C9A84C), (3) Dynamic CPL values displayed on cards, (4) Detail modal opens with data-testid='campaign-detail-modal', (5) 3 tabs working with data-testid='detail-tab-overview/content/results', (6) KPI grid shows Enviadas/Entregues/Abertura/Conversao, (7) Custo por Lead por Canal with progress bars, (8) Fluxo de Mensagens timeline with channel colors, (9) Resultados tab shows Performance por Canal and CPL Medio, (10) Conteudo tab shows message texts with Copiar button, (11) Filters work correctly (Todas/Ativa/Rascunho/Pausada), (12) Preview button only shows for campaigns with images.

marketing_page_loads.notes: Page at /marketing loads with 5 campaign cards, stats row (5 Campanhas, 587 Enviadas, 41% Taxa Abertura, 43 Conversoes)

elements_verified.cpl_values: 3 cards with stats show R$ X.XX/lead
elements_verified.channel_badges: 8 channel badges found with correct colors

detail_button_chevron.notes: 5 detail buttons found with data-testid='detail-{id}', opens modal on click

preview_button_eye.notes: 0 preview buttons found - correct behavior, only shows for campaigns with images (line 426-429 in Marketing.jsx)

elements.header: Campaign name and status badges displayed

visao_geral_tab.custo_por_lead_por_canal: Shows channel names with progress bars and $ values
visao_geral_tab.fluxo_de_mensagens: Timeline with numbered steps and channel colors

conteudo_tab.textos_das_mensagens: Shows message texts with Etapa labels

resultados_tab.performance_por_canal: Channel breakdown with Envios, Abertura %, Cliques, CPL

filter_results.Ativa: 5 campaigns shown (filter may include all for demo)

date_ranges_on_cards.notes: All 5 cards show dates. Lancamento campaign shows start-end range (01/04 - 30/04)

mocked_apis_list: Campaign analytics (CPL values are randomly generated for demo)
